title: Add test-service-images CI job with stestr support
summary: Review #3 following berendt's external review #2. All 3 WARNING findings and 1 INFO finding from the external review have been correctly addressed: (W-001) sync cross-reference comments added above all 3 duplicated steps in test-service-images, (W-002) set -e error propagation added to the inner bash -c script with set +e only around stestr run to capture its exit code, (W-003) INSTALL_SPEC wiring validation added to test_test_service_images_env_vars with assertions for both the env var reference and the [test] extra in pip-extras, (I-001) TestMappedAuth exclusion comment updated to mention SAML2/OAuth2 federation. Both test suites pass: verify_build_images_workflow.sh (286/0) and verify_release_config.sh (20/0). Review patterns updated with new occurrences and a new error-propagation pattern.

tests_checklist.item: New INSTALL_SPEC wiring assertions cover env var reference and [test] extra
Edge cases: yq queries use || true guard for empty results

code_quality_checklist.item: Sync comments match exact wording convention from CC-0007 pattern
set -e/set +e/set -e pattern is minimal and correctly scoped
No unnecessary code or scope creep beyond external review feedback

security_checklist.item: No new expression injection vectors (all matrix values via env:)
Error propagation prevents silent setup failures masking real errors

architecture_checklist.item: Changes are minimal and focused on addressing external review feedback
Review patterns correctly capture lessons learned for future reviews

dry_yagni_checklist.item: Sync comments document existing duplication rather than adding new

fail_fast_checklist.item: set -e ensures pip install/stestr init failures abort immediately
set +e scoped only to stestr run for exit code capture

defensive_checklist.item: INSTALL_SPEC wiring now validated by tests (prevents silent misconfiguration)
TestMappedAuth comment accurately describes exclusion scope

suggested_improvements: I-001 (minor): The W-003 review pattern entry (INSTALL_SPEC wiring gap) was filed under remove-tests-that-only-verify-language-semantics.md, but the finding is about a missing test for env var wiring — not about removing useless tests. Consider moving it to a more fitting pattern file (e.g., a new 'ensure-pipeline-variable-wiring-is-tested' pattern) in a future cleanup.
next_steps: Address this review's suggestion about review pattern categorization in a follow-up (non-blocking)
